footer.tagline: Live volleyball statistics. Log every action, follow the score in real time and improve match after match.
footer.rights: © {year} Voley Stats Live. All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: Log every action of the match, follow the score and efficiency in real time, and download reports per set and per player. Say goodbye to paper scoresheets.

product.title: Take control of the whole match
product.text: Log every player's stats action by action: reception, serve, attack, block, dig and setting. Compare performance across sets, spot the runs and make your substitutions with data, not gut feeling.
product.point1: Score and efficiency updated action by action.
product.point2: Automatic detection of scoring and error runs.
product.point3: Breakdown per player and per court area.
product.point4: Filter the stats set by set.

how.title: From the court to the report in three steps
how.subtitle: No learning curve. Start logging in your very first match.
how.step1Text: Record every play from the app during the match: serve, reception, attack, block, dig and setting.
how.step2Text: Share the match code and anyone can watch the score and stats in real time from the web.
how.step3Text: When it's over, generate a PDF with the match summary per set and per player to review with the team.

features.title: Everything your coaching staff needs
features.subtitle: Tools built for coaches, analysts and players.
features.f1Text: Follow the result set by set and how the match unfolds in real time from any device.
features.f2Text: Evaluate individual performance in every area and find your roster's strengths.
features.f3Text: Reception, serve, attack, block, dig and setting: measure efficiency in every phase of the game.
features.f4Text: Visualize point and error runs to understand the key moments of every set.
features.f5Text: Download match and season reports to share with your coaching staff and players.
features.f6Text: Share a simple code and the whole team can check the stats online, no complicated sign-ups.

download.title: Take your team to the next level
download.text: Download Voley Stats Live and start logging statistics in your next match. Free to get started.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: And if you can't find your answer, write to us and we'll help.
faq.a1: It's an app for logging and checking volleyball statistics in real time. You record every action of the match from the app, and anyone can follow the score and stats live on the web using the team code.
faq.q2: How do I check my team's stats online?
faq.a2: Go to the 'Watch live' section, enter your team code and access the live score and match stats, with a breakdown per set and per player.
faq.a3: You can log actions in all six areas of the game: reception, serve, attack, block, dig and setting, plus the score, the runs and each player's efficiency.
faq.q4: Can I download a match report?
faq.a4: Yes. When the match ends you can generate a PDF with the summary per set and per player to analyze and share with the team.
faq.q5: Do I need an internet connection?
faq.a5: Yes, statistics sync in real time, so you need a connection to log actions and for everyone else to watch the live feed.
faq.a6: You can start using Voley Stats Live for free. Download the app and enter your team code to start logging and checking stats.
